tweets.text: Special Rep: Brian Hook: #Iran’s Foreign Minister @JZarif enjoys making the rounds on American media, where he can express his opinion freely. This “moderate” denies his own people the same freedom and his government routinely jails reporters. #رژیم_ریاکار
This Week at State: @SecPompeo joined @POTUS at #UNGA to share America’s priorities with leaders from nearly 200 countries. Read more: https://t.co/HpuFCs46Jl https://t.co/wnJs19Ch84

On the margins of #UNGA, @SecPompeo met with #Lithuania’s President @Grybauskaite_LT and #Norway's Prime Minister @erna_solberg. The leaders agreed on the importance of enhanced regional security coordination, including on air defense and energy security. https://t.co/dUew6RbOjT

Deputy Secretary Sullivan met with ten members countries of @ASEAN on the margins of #UNGA. The U.S. and ASEAN reaffirmed their strategic partnership and discussed the U.S. commitment to a free and open Indo-Pacific region. https://t.co/nm7YhXyICR https://t.co/P9vhtbjs5y

Today, Deputy Secretary Sullivan hosted a ministerial emphasizing that responsible state behavior in cyberspace should be guided by international law, adherence during peacetime to non-binding norms of state behavior, and implementation of practical confidence building measures. https://t.co/tFuNvlCmjb

During #UNGA, DepSec Sullivan hosted a meeting with the @CARICOMorg to strengthen their engagement, work together to protect their region and peoples, and promote mutual interests to pursue a shared vision of a secure and prosperous Western Hemisphere. https://t.co/xf2gBUz1Hk

Today at #UNGA, Deputy Secretary Sullivan met with Irish Tánaiste and Minister for Foreign Affairs and Trade Coveney. The leaders discussed Brexit talks between the UK and the European Union, the importance of supporting Middle East peace efforts and more. https://t.co/RNSVj1lEgC
Today, @SecPompeo met with #Nigeria's President @MBuhari in New York City. #UNGA https://t.co/j7Rfu6eihX
Today, @SecPompeo met with #Bulgaria's Prime Minister @BoykoBorissov in New York City. #UNGA https://t.co/WXtHLIoaFX
Today, @SecPompeo met with #Ethiopia's Foreign Minister Workneh Gebeyehu in New York City. #UNGA https://t.co/CUnoHJCF98
Today, @SecPompeo met with South African Foreign Minister @LindiweSisuluSA in New York City. #UNGA https://t.co/OyRn5lO1ax

Advisor Brian Hook: What we are demanding of the Iranian regime -- stop persecuting civil society, provide all Iranian citizens with due process, regardless of their political and religious beliefs and end the support of terrorists proxies who destabilize other nations. https://t.co/0f8a55fGW1
.@StateDeptSpox: We urge our partners and allies and all nations to publicly support the Iranian people and their demands for human rights and fundamental freedoms. https://t.co/fQyO1TGBCq
Happening now: @StateDeptSpox, Advisor Brian Hook, and Ambassador Michael Kozak brief the press on #humanrights in #Iran at the @ForeignPressCtr in New York City. https://t.co/8wk3H7HKiL

Deputy Sec. Sullivan met with Foreign Ministers of the 10 @ASEAN member states to highlight the U.S commitment to a free & open #IndoPacific region, with ASEAN & SEAsia at its center. He reaffirmed our strategic partnership & commended #ASEAN efforts to implement UNSCRs on #DPRK. https://t.co/CDQIj6GT1R
Today, @SecPompeo met with #Burma's Minister for the Office of the State Counselor Kyaw Tint Swe in New York City. #UNGA https://t.co/OR2FjJ2kbQ

Deputy Secretary Sullivan hosted officials from #Fiji, #FSM, #Kiribati, #Nauru, #Palau, #PNG, #MarshallIslands, #Samoa, #SolomonIslands, #Tonga, #Tuvalu, #Vanuatu, #PIF & #SPC to discuss humanitarian assistance, disaster response, and resilient responses to climate change. #UNGA https://t.co/0jyff9OexC
Today, @SecPompeo chaired a meeting on #DPRK with members of the @UN Security Council in New York City. https://t.co/htwIGIZmzl

Honoring the late President Tran Dai Quang, who stood for a proud and independent #Vietnam, Deputy Secretary Sullivan and @FMPhamBinhMinh affirmed our joint commitment to promote peace, security, and prosperity in the Indo-Pacific region. https://t.co/ssn7m8nRol

Special Representative Brian Hook briefed reporters on #Iran policy and  discussed the Iran Action Group’s report, “Outlaw Regime: A Chronicle of Iran’s Destructive Activities." Download the report: https://t.co/tmsGeAeaXn #UNGA https://t.co/YOke2MmLW9
Watch @POTUS host a press conference at #UNGA in New York City. https://t.co/eNVSWeCDQa

Today, Under Secretary for Political Affairs David Hale convened a meeting on the #SouthSudan peace process at #UNGA. Under Secretary Hale emphasized the U.S. partnership with the South Sudanese people and the region for a sustainable peace in South Sudan. https://t.co/r7QLXoW4YT

Deputy Sec Sullivan presented 2 new Good Practices documents at 9th #GCTF Ministerial addressing families of returning foreign terrorist fighters & threat of homegrown terrorists inspired or directed by #ISIS & other transnational terrorist groups. https://t.co/xBHazLyHuZ #UNGA https://t.co/OSzO4jYpvv

Go to https://t.co/58Uc9lIgDz & download @StateDept's report on #Iran regime's malign activities. It covers the regime's support for terrorism, its missile program, illicit financial activities, threats to maritime security & cybersecurity, as well as human rights abuses. https://t.co/N7EQqtlHVF

Today, the United States will chair a UN Security Council meeting on counterproliferation, one of the U.S.' policy priorities during #UNGA. Watch @UnderSecT Andrea Thompson highlight how we will be engaging on nonproliferation issues this week and beyond. https://t.co/8SX7RInsdv
.@SecPompeo also discussed the pressure campaign on #Iran's regime during his interview with @CBSThisMorning: "European businesses are voting with their checkbooks. They are leaving Iran in droves."
.@SecPompeo spoke to @NorahODonnell on @CBSThisMorning about the #DPRK and continuing our work towards the final, fully verified denuclearization of the Korean peninsula.

At #UNGA Deputy Secretary Sullivan thanked Minister Augusto for #Angola’s regional leadership in supporting credible & non-violent elections in the Democratic Republic of the Congo & encouraged Angola to keep pressure on #DPRK to work towards a denuclearized Korean Peninsula. https://t.co/7hDN6DsPsu

.@SecPompeo: The United States will hold the regime in #Iran accountable for any attack that results in injury to our personnel or damage to our facilities. America will respond swiftly and decisively in defense of American lives. https://t.co/bj3KqJuREa

.@SecPompeo: @UN Charter calls for nations to "live together in peace with one another as good neighbors." Has the regime in #Iran lived together with other nations in peace? Has it been a good neighbor? Look around the world and you'll see the answer is a deafening "no." https://t.co/txp1kKIPBz

.@SecPompeo: The United States says this to the people of #Iran: our pledges of support do not end with our words. The United States hears you; the United States supports you; the United States is with you. https://t.co/TB8H3Z9GlP
.@SecPompeo: The Iranian regime is more concerned with heavy water than drinking water. #Iran https://t.co/mXqSvgOxLX
.@SecPompeo: The United States will continue to coalesce international efforts to change Iranian behavior through pressure, deterrence, and support for the people of #Iran. https://t.co/ivNFyXVlGf

.@SecPompeo: The regime provides over $100 million each year to terrorist groups like Hamas & Palestinian Islamic Jihad…From 2008 to 2017, #Iran only gave a paltry $20,000 to @UNRWA. Meanwhile U.S. gave nearly 3 billion dollars over same period – that is 150,000 times as much. https://t.co/s7AhwaAmvu

.@SecPompeo: The U.S. was disturbed & deeply disappointed to hear the remaining parties in the deal announce they are setting up a special payment system to bypass U.S. sanctions. This is one of most counterproductive measures imaginable for regional & global peace & security. https://t.co/S57WiJpVl2

.@SecPompeo: The Iranian regime’s track record over the past 40 years has revealed it as among the worst violators of the @UN Charter and UN Security Council Resolutions. It is truly an outlaw regime. https://t.co/GqMugqf7Ww

Today, the United States imposed new sanctions on current or former officials & associates of the #Venezuela government. The U.S. will continue to take concrete & forceful action against those who are involved in the destruction of democracy in Venezuela. https://t.co/D5HzqJiSmk

During an event with @foreignoffice to step up action in our shared fight against #humantrafficking, Deputy Secretary John Sullivan announced additional funding to support the Program to End Modern Slavery and new principles to guide government action. #UNGA https://t.co/DGO4sSEMxf

#ICYMI @SecPompeo addressed U.S. efforts to advance religious freedom, @USUN Ambassador Haley previewed U.S. priorities for #UNGA, and Special Representative Hook discussed #Iran policy. More from this week at State: https://t.co/fbjhO50BO6 https://t.co/6wCM8knqBz
.@SecPompeo: We are, and continue to be, the most generous nation in the world. Read more from Secretary Pompeo on America’s commitment to the most vulnerable on DipNote. https://t.co/0yzQ9UcrbT

.@SecPompeo: This year’s #IRFMinisterial wasn’t just about talking; it’s about action and change. We intend to show the world that we’re not just paying lip service to religious freedom, but that we will act to further its cause in every corner of the globe. https://t.co/awg6pXM0HR

.@SecPompeo: We are fighting for human dignity of the people of #Iran by speaking the truth about the oppressive, corrupt regime in Tehran. We stand w/Baha’is, Christians, Jews, Sufi Muslims, Zoroastrians & other faith groups who've had their human dignity violated by the regime. https://t.co/9P90YB1KkS

.@SecPompeo: Since the earliest days of his presidency, @POTUS has directed his administration to advance and defend religious freedom at home and abroad, because religious freedom is a universal, God-given right to which all people are entitled. https://t.co/PCELC8QfFk

Special Representative Brian Hook: @JZarif says the people of #Iran are struggling because: “We chose to live this way.” Maybe he did, but it’s certainly not the way of life the Iranian people have chosen.

.@SecPompeo: We know American diplomacy is most agile & effective when we have our entire team in place. When we have senior leadership that is empowered to give direction to our mission, our teams at home & across the world can better deliver on that mission with maximum impact. https://t.co/j1T4P0NGe9

.@SecPompeo: @POTUS signed an Executive Order that made clear our Administration will not tolerate foreign interference in our democratic processes. Elections are the foundation of our democracy & preserving their integrity is a matter of protecting sovereignty & nat’l security. https://t.co/a3CWjuuA10

.@SecPompeo: We are also tracking the super typhoon #Mangkhut in the Pacific Ocean right now. Our thoughts and prayers are with our friends in the #Philippines and elsewhere, and our @StateDept teams are ready to deliver the appropriate help to the region. https://t.co/DqCE6x8xVb

.@SecPompeo: I want to let our fellow Americans who are affected by #HurricaneFlorence to know that our prayers are with them. @POTUS is closely monitoring situation, the federal govt is providing the necessary help & we encourage everyone to take the right steps to stay safe. https://t.co/IusKZqrz6V
